blocks.text: Barcelona 7-2 Newcastle, Glimt 0-5 — Europe's knockout week was brutal
Barcelona demolished Newcastle 7-2, Liverpool cruised 4-0, Chelsea collapsed 0-3 to PSG, and Bodø/Glimt were hammered 5-0 by Sporting. The Champions League carnage is done. PL resumes tonight.

blocks.label: ⚽ Weekend must-watch
items: Sat 13:30 — Liverpool at Brighton (PL, Liverpool 5th — can they close the gap?)
Sat 16:00 — Crystal Palace at Manchester City (City 2nd, must win)
Sun 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle United (Tyne-Wear derby — always unpredictable)
Sun 14:00 — Rayo Vallecano at Barcelona (La Liga, Barça riding a 7-goal high)
